board_brief: LV data/comms distribution sub-DB (DB-COMMS) for a generic IEC commercial 3-storey office. 32A TPN intake fed from MSB-MAIN F06 (32A MCB Type C, 50m feeder) with Type B RCD upstream per IEC 60364-5-53:2002+A2:2015 §531.3.3 for IT equipment with DC leakage components, and BS EN 50173:2018 EMC/leakage compliance. 7 circuits: 24-port main comms rack + 3 floor-IDF cabinets (GF/L1/L2) + 2 PoE+ injectors (Wi-Fi APs + security cameras) + 1 UPS bypass loop feed. Located in ground-floor main comms room (MDF).

standards_stack.it_load_rcd_standard: IEC 60364-5-53:2002+A2:2015 §531.3.3 (Type B RCD selection for loads with DC leakage components)
standards_stack.structured_cabling_standard: BS EN 50173-1:2018 + BS EN 50173-2:2018 (information technology generic cabling systems — EMC/leakage)

supply.fed_from: MSB-MAIN F06 32A MCB Type C with Type B RCD upstream per IEC 60364-5-53:2002+A2:2015 §531.3.3 / BS EN 50173:2018 EMC/leakage
supply.system_type: TN-S (utility transformer earthed; building distribution TN-S)

board.location: ground-floor main comms room (MDF), adjacent to MSB-MAIN
